channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump weighs military and diplomatic options amid escalating nuclear rhetoric toward Iran
item.description: As tensions between the United States and Iran escalate, President Donald Trump has issued an ultimatum giving Tehran until 8:00 p.m. Eastern Time to reach a peace deal or face severe military consequ...

item.title: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor relocates to renovated Marsh Farm on Sandringham Estate
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, 66, has officially moved into his new residence at Marsh Farm on the Sandringham Estate after residing at Wood Farm since February. The move follows his eviction from the R...

item.title: BJP announces development and welfare measures ahead of Puducherry polls
item.description: Union Minister and BJP national president JP Nadda announced a series of welfare and development measures for Puducherry ahead of the upcoming assembly elections. He stated that if the NDA government ...

item.title: Study Finds AI-Generated Disinformation Targeted Muslims in Assam Polls
item.description: A recent report by the advocacy group Foundation Diaspora in Action for Human Rights and Democracy has revealed that the Assam Assembly election witnessed what is being called 'the first industrialise...

item.title: UK Blocks Kanye West from Wireless Festival After Sponsors Pull Out
item.description: Kanye West haikubaliwa kuingia Uingereza, jambo linalosababisha shambulio kubwa kwa mpango wake wa kuongoza kipindi cha maonyesho kwenye Wireless Festival huko London. Serikali ya Uingereza ilikataa o...

item.title: Tanzania Intensifies Crackdown on Illegal Online Cosmetic and Medicine Sales
item.description: The government ya Tanzania is now taking a firm stand against online sellers who are hawking cosmetics and medicines that haven’t been registered with the relevant authorities. This action, spearheade...

item.title: Key Constituencies in Malappuram See Intense Contests Ahead of Kerala Assembly Elections 2026
item.description: As Kerala prepares for the Assembly elections on April 9, 2026, Malappuram district remains predominantly a stronghold of the United Democratic Front (UDF), holding 13 out of 16 seats. Despite this ad...

item.title: Federal Ghost Gear Fund Returns, Offering New Hope Amid Reduced Funding
item.description: The Ghost Gear Fund, which supports organizations in marine and beach cleanups, is set to return with a reduced budget. Announced by the Department of Fisheries and Oceans, the fund will now be worth ...

item.title: Engr. Sunday Nicodemus Etete Receives Honorary Doctorate For Community Development
item.description: Engr. Sunday Nicodemus Etete, a renowned philanthropist and community developer, has been awarded an Honorary Doctorate Degree by British Standard University in Cotonou, Benin Republic. This prestigio...

item.title: Northern Cape Community Health Workers Face Uncertainty Despite Partial Government Absorption
item.description: Following a 2025 Labour Court ruling requiring the permanent absorption of community health workers (CHWs) into government employment, implementation in the Northern Cape has sparked frustration. CHWs...

item.title: PM Shehbaz's Appeal for Two-Week Extension in Deadline and Opening of Hormuz Strait
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has appealed to US President Donald Trump to extend the deadline for Iran to reach a deal and reopen the Strait of Hormuz by an additional two weeks. This request comes j...

item.title: VP Sara stresses importance of education for families amid financial challenges
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has called on Filipino families to continue prioritizing their children's education despite the rising cost of living. Speaking at the Rambakan Festival in Lamut, Ifugao, D...

item.title: Assam Police Arrives at Pawan Khera's Residence in Delhi After Allegations from Himanta's Wife
item.description: On April 7, 2026, Assam police arrived at Congress leader Pawan Khera's residence in Nizamuddin, Delhi, following an FIR filed by Riniki Bhuyan Sharma, the wife of Assam CM Himanta Biswa Sarma. The FI...

item.title: Kenyan Authorities Crack Down on Illegal Insect Trade
item.description: Things are getting serious about wildlife trafficking in Kenya, and it's not just lions and elephants causing the fuss. Recent seizures at Nairobi’s airport, like the one involving over 2,000 garden a...

item.title: KICD Requests Updated Grade 10 Enrollment Figures to Ensure Fair Textbook Distribution
item.description: The Kenya Institute of Curriculum Development (KICD) has called on all principals of public senior schools to submit the latest enrollment data for Grade 10 learners. This move is meant to streamline ...

item.title: Trump Threatens Strikes on Iranian Civilian Infrastructure Amid Global Condemnation
item.description: The article reports on heightened tensions between the United States and Iran following President Donald Trump's threat to launch attacks on Iranian civilian infrastructure if Tehran fails to meet a U...

item.title: Peter MacKinnon argues Ottawa is undermining Charter rights and the notwithstanding clause
item.description: In this opinion piece, former university president Peter MacKinnon argues that the federal government has adopted an overly dismissive attitude toward Charter‑protected rights. He points to the federa...

item.title: CalMac Ferries Faces Major Disruption as Fleet Undergoes Repairs and Technical Faults
item.description: CalMac Ferries is currently experiencing significant disruption, with nearly one-third of its fleet out of service due to a combination of technical faults and annual maintenance. The latest vessel to...

item.title: Iran Proposes Fees for Strait of Hormuz Transit Amid Tensions with US and Israel
item.description: Iran has proposed charging fees for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz as part of potential peace negotiations to end its conflict with Israel and the US. The strait, a narrow 34km waterway be...

item.title: US Aircraft Destroyed During Rescue Mission in Iran’s Isfahan Province
item.description: In a remote desert area of Isfahan province, Iran, the aftermath of a complex US military rescue operation left two C-130 Hercules planes and two helicopters destroyed. The mission, aimed at rescuing ...
